zone_placement_rules.notes: Door stays centered -- see LAY-INTERIOR-HOUSE-COMPACT's note; unlike the Shop offset tier, this House tier's 'offset' is about the hearth_accent, not the door, because house.pattern.md gives no evidenced exception for an off-axis House door.
house.pattern.md, directly evidenced: 'One observed house omits this accent from the direct centerline (placed off-axis, one tile from center).'

provenance.notes: Unlike LAY-INTERIOR-HOUSE-COMPACT (which both observed houses corroborate identically, hence High), this tier represents only ONE of the two observed houses' specific accent-placement choice -- the other observed house centers its accent instead. Filed at medium, not high, to reflect that this specific configuration has single-sample support even though the archetype as a whole is High confidence.
